scenario: front obstacle detected by 8x8 matrix waist zone only

expected_behavior.left_haptic: mirrors right haptic because obstacle is directly ahead
expected_behavior.right_haptic: mirrors left haptic because obstacle is directly ahead
expected_behavior.mode: stays NORMAL because heart rate stays below abnormal threshold and no fall is present

note: This fixture is enriched for offline analysis. The current firmware BLE packet does not expose obstacle-source bits directly.
